campaign: C3 — Web inbox + triage surface + badges

phases.title: API types + data hooks
phases.outcome: regen openapi.json (+ benign @hono/zod-openapi format normalization, noted) + api-types.d.ts; api.ts Notes section (re-exports + envelope interfaces + 8 wrappers); use-notes.ts (noteKeys + 3 queries + 5 mutations, cross-invalidate proposalKeys/taskKeys on promote); web typecheck/test 370/build + root typecheck green

phases.title: inbox page + nav
phases.outcome: notes-page.tsx (card grid, kind/status/anchor/severity filters, client-side title+body search, anchor+promoted-target resolution) + /notes route + sidebar Inbox nav; web tests 377/typecheck/build green. FIX: anchor map-miss renders raw type+id (server list caps tasks at 50) — NOT '(removed)'; true dangling detection deferred (needs per-anchor resolution)

phases.title: triage actions UI
phases.outcome: DismissNoteDialog (required reason) + PromoteToProposalDialog + human-gated PromoteToTaskDialog (currentUser.type==='human', defense-in-depth over server 403) on open notes only; ForceLandDialog pattern; web tests 382/typecheck/build green

phases.title: backlog banner + live SSE
phases.outcome: note.* SSE invalidates noteKeys.all (live inbox); note.backlog_alert raises a sonner TOAST (no banner stack exists — mirrored the stale-claim toast precedent, identity-masked); useNotesHealth mounted in app-layout as the edge-trigger driver. COMMANDER DECISION: 'banner' read as toast (faithful to codebase) + a persistent sidebar Inbox count badge deferred to P5 for the standing-indicator intent. web tests 385/typecheck/build green

phases.title: anchored-note badges + sidebar Inbox count badge (standing backlog indicator) + E2E seal
phases.outcome: AnchoredNotesBadge on task/epic/proposal detail (deep-links to inbox filtered by anchor via new validateSearch); sidebar Inbox open-count badge (useNotesHealth, dedup w/ app-layout poll); E2E 06-notes-inbox (post->inbox->promote->provenance) passes 3/3. web tests 393/typecheck/build/lint green. Verifier-caught epic-detail-page.test QueryClient crash fixed. 3 OTHER E2E specs fail = pre-existing flakiness (01/02/05 untouched by C3, git-diff-confirmed)

open_issues: db:generate blocked by pre-existing 0005/0006 snapshot collision (no migrations in C3 — web only, so likely N/A this campaign)
P5 badges are the defensible trim per the vision — may defer to follow-up only if a real blocker surfaces
